routes.purpose: Homepage. Redirects authenticated users to /browse. Serves as entry point for the app.

gate.description: Public landing page; redirects to browse (no gate)

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /browse

entry_points: Direct navigation / deep links from invite tokens
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: N/A (redirect only)
routes.notes: Minimal route; essentially a router. No content rendered.

routes.purpose: Dev-only design system preview. Renders AvailabilityCalendar component for visual testing.

gate.description: Public dev page; no authentication or gating

persona_access.guest: Full access

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Uses inline padding (p-10); likely breaks at <375px mobile. No responsive Tailwind sm:/md: classes.
routes.notes: Dead-end dev-only page. Should be hidden in production or behind a feature flag. Hardcoded blockedRanges=[] with no interactivity.

routes.purpose: Phone-first sign-in flow with OTP verification and email fallback. Uses Clerk's phone_code strategy.

gate.description: Public; no authentication required (unauthenticated users sign in here)

persona_access.guest: Full access — phone/OTP/email entry

entry_points: Middleware redirect from protected routes (?redirect_url parameter)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[520px], md:py-16, responsive text sizes (md:text-4xl), XL_INPUT uses h-16 rounded-2xl. Should scale well to 375px.
routes.notes: Multi-step state machine (phone → OTP → email fallback). Properly handles Clerk's createdSessionId flow. Uses parsePhoneNumberFromString for validation. Email fallback wraps Clerk's <SignIn /> component with routing='hash'.

routes.purpose: Phone-first account creation with OTP verification, followed by name/password entry and optional Google SSO.

gate.description: Public; no authentication required

persona_access.guest: Full access — new account creation
persona_access.host: Full access — same path as guests
persona_access.inviter: Full access — same path as guests

exit_points: redirect_url query param on success (defaults to /browse)
states: account (name, password, optional email + Google SSO button)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[520px], responsive text (md:text-4xl), md:py-16. XL_INPUT and BIG_INPUT Tailwind classes handle sizing well on narrow screens.
routes.notes: Two-factor signup: phone + password. Email is optional (only used if user provides it). Google SSO offered on account step. Post-phone-verification, email verification is skipped for alpha (comment at line 119-121 notes this will be enabled later). Password minimum is 8 characters. Properly marshals through Clerk's signUp.update() and setActive().

routes.purpose: Main public listing browse/search interface. Server-renders grid of listings with trust gating, filters (location/price/bedrooms/trust score), and search.

gate.description: Anonymous viewers see only listings with see_preview='anyone_anywhere'. Signed-in users see listings based on trust degree (1°=direct vouch, 2°=connector, 3°=mustard, 4°+=zinc). Zero-vouch users see only 'anyone' listings. Trust-scored filter (--trust) available to signed-in users.

persona_access.guest: Sees 'anyone_anywhere' preview listings only; cannot request book, message, or request intro. Can see full details on hover/preview but cannot book.
persona_access.host: Sees all listings except own. Trust direction: host→viewer (how much host trusts guest).
persona_access.inviter: Same as guest — browse is uniform across personas; inviter role doesn't unlock additional listings.

entry_points: Logo/nav clicks from any authenticated route
states: gated (authenticated user with insufficient trust sees 'not accessible' overlay)
full-access (listing fully visible with book button)
zero-vouches (user has no vouches; filtered to 'anyone' listings only)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Host's trust of guest. Labels appear as 'X degree connection' / 'Vouched by' badges on listing cards showing direction of host→guest vouch path.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Excellent: sticky search pill (md:hidden), grid responsive (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4), px-4 md:px-10 lg:px-20 padding scales well. Suspense boundaries isolate search/filter loading states.
routes.notes: Complex trust evaluation server-side: computeIncomingTrustPaths batches all listings' hosts at once (reverse-batched for 1 DB roundtrip). Zero-vouch users filtered in JS. Trust score sorting optional. canSeePreview/canSeeFull gates determine overlay rendering. Desktop nav portals search + filters into nav center slot (NavCenterPortal). Mobile uses collapsing search pill + filter sheet.

routes.purpose: Main user hub. Tabs for hosting (listings management), traveling (upcoming/past trips), and network (vouch/trust management). Tab state in query param.

gate.description: Middleware redirects unauthenticated users to /sign-in. Authenticated users can access all three tabs.

persona_access.guest: Sees 'traveling' (trips) and 'network' (vouches) tabs. 'Hosting' tab visible but redirects to /dashboard (empty state).
persona_access.host: Sees all three tabs: 'hosting' (manage listings), 'traveling' (trips as guest), 'network'.
persona_access.inviter: Same as host — role doesn't gate tab visibility; inviter capability is just a flag on data.

states: hosting (empty state if no listings; grid of listing cards otherwise)
traveling (empty state if no trips; list of upcoming/past trips otherwise)
network (trust overview, vouch count, invite list, 'add vouch' button)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Outgoing (viewer's trust of others, for vouch/invite UI). Network tab shows vouchees and incoming vouch count.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Likely responsive; uses client-side tab switching (DashboardContent handles layout). Inherits (app) layout padding/nav. No hardcoded widths visible in this file.
routes.notes: Server renders minimal page.tsx; DashboardContent is client-side with state machine for tab selection. Query param ?tab={hosting|traveling|network} sets default tab. Legacy redirect routes consolidate all into one page. Edge-compatible (export const runtime='edge').

routes.purpose: Legacy redirect route. Directs to /dashboard?tab=network for consolidated dashboard UI.

gate.description: Middleware enforces auth; redirect happens server-side.

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /dashboard?tab=network (same access as from main dashboard)

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: N/A (redirect only)
routes.notes: Orphaned legacy route. Should be removed or kept as redirect for backward compatibility. Comment explains migration to single /dashboard page.

routes.purpose: Legacy redirect route. Directs to /dashboard?tab=traveling for unified dashboard.

gate.description: Auth enforced by middleware.

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /dashboard?tab=traveling

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: N/A
routes.notes: Legacy redirect. Candidate for removal.

routes.purpose: Public help center with FAQ and contact form. Allows any user (authenticated or not) to browse FAQs and submit support requests.

gate.description: Fully public; no authentication or trust gating.

persona_access.guest: Full access to FAQs and contact form. Can submit support requests as anonymous.
persona_access.host: Full access; name/email pre-fill likely from Clerk context.

entry_points: Help link from nav (likely in footer or mobile nav)
Links from error states or onboarding
exit_points: Browse back (no outbound links visible in code)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[880px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10, text responsive (md:text-3xl). Uses md: breakpoints correctly.
routes.notes: Simple static page. Uses HelpFaq component with imported FAQS constant. HelpContactForm handles POST logic (network error handling in form component). Edge-compatible (runtime='edge').

routes.purpose: Legacy redirect. Directs to /dashboard for consolidated hosting/traveling/network UI.

gate.description: Auth enforced by middleware.

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /dashboard (hosting tab empty if user has no listings)

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: N/A
routes.notes: Orphaned route. Consolidation complete; should remove.

routes.purpose: Listing creation wizard. Multi-step form for hosts to create a new listing with details, photos, availability, pricing, amenities, and trust-gating rules.

gate.description: Auth enforced by middleware. Creators (logged-in users) can create listings for themselves.

persona_access.guest: Cannot access; attempted access redirects to /sign-in.
persona_access.host: Full access to complete listing wizard.
persona_access.inviter: Full access; same as host (inviter is a secondary capability, not a primary role).

exit_points: Inline 'Edit' link to jump to full listing detail
routes.trust_direction_copy: Listing gate (host-facing). Hosts set see_preview, see_full, can_message, can_request_book rules. Direction: host controls who sees what (host→guest visibility rules). Later shown in browse as host→guest score.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Very large component (35k+ tokens). Likely responsive via Tailwind (grid-cols-2 gap-2 for name/last name, max-w-[1100px] container), but needs verification by reading full file. Uses relative layouts and flex for step content.
routes.notes: Huge multi-step component using useState for WizardState. PhotoUploader delegates to separate component (likely uses Cloudinary or similar). LocationPreview, AmenitiesSection, AvailabilityCalendarWrapper, LocationMapClient all delegated. Uses encodeListingMeta() for serialization. Visibility/access rules merged into single collapsed model (visibility_mode + access_settings). Two-gate model (preview vs. full access).

routes.purpose: Listing editor for hosts. Shows cover photo, status (Active/Paused), title, and location. Allows editing of listing details via EditListingForm.

gate.description: Auth enforced. Additionally, route checks if current user is the listing owner (listing.host_id === currentUser.id). Non-owners redirected to /hosting.

persona_access.guest: Cannot access (redirected to /sign-in).
persona_access.host: Full access if they own the listing. Non-owner hosts see 404 or redirect.
persona_access.inviter: Full access if they're also a host who owns this listing.

entry_points: Button from /dashboard hosting tab ('Edit' on listing card)
exit_points: EditListingForm buttons (save, delete, etc. — form handles routing)
states: loading (cover photo + title card shown as hero)
routes.trust_direction_copy: N/A (editing interface, not a public view)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: md:flex-row for hero card (switches to col on mobile), max-w-[1100px] container, px-6 lg:px-10, responsive image sizing (h-36 w-full md:h-32 md:w-48). Layout should adapt to 375px.
routes.notes: Owner-gated. Renders hero card with cover photo, status badge, area name, title. Checks is_active flag for badge styling. EditListingForm component delegated for actual form. parseListingMeta() deserializes description field (uses separator to split metadata + body). Photos prefetched from DB. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Message inbox hub. Desktop split-view: left sidebar lists threads, right pane shows selected thread detail. Mobile shows list only (threads link to /inbox/[threadId]).

gate.description: Enforced by middleware. Auth required to view your own threads.

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /sign-in if not authenticated. Cannot see others' threads.
persona_access.host: Sees all threads they're a party to (as host or guest).

entry_points: Booking confirmation (contact request created) → new thread
exit_points: /inbox/[threadId] (click thread on mobile or on list)
states: empty (zero threads: empty state with 'Browse listings' button)
thread-list (list of InboxList items on left)
select-prompt (desktop, no thread selected: 'Select a conversation')
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Excellent responsive design: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[360px_1fr] splits sidebar + detail on desktop. Mobile shows list only (detail hidden with hidden md:flex). Sticky header on mobile with back button (md:hidden). SafeAreaInset padding handled in layout.tsx.
routes.notes: Desktop split-view pattern. Mobile routes through /inbox/[threadId] for full-screen threads. ThreadView can show message composition. Threads fetched server-side; selectedId param in query (?thread=<id>) for desktop pre-selection. Empty state checks threads.length === 0 and shows placeholder. Uses getCurrentUser() to enforce auth.

routes.purpose: Thread detail page. On desktop, renders same split-view as /inbox (sidebar + selected thread). On mobile, full-screen thread view with back button. Allows viewing and composing messages within a single conversation.

gate.description: Enforced by middleware. Additionally, route validates that current user is a party to the thread (getThreadDetail checks ownership).

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /sign-in if not authenticated.
persona_access.host: Can view and compose messages in threads they're party to.

entry_points: Direct /inbox/[threadId] URL (if you're a party to the thread)
exit_points: Back link to /inbox (mobile only, top left)
states: thread-detail (ThreadView rendered full-screen on mobile, right pane on desktop)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Excellent: md:hidden for back button (mobile-only). Desktop shows split-view (md:grid-cols-[360px_1fr]). Full-screen height calculated (md:h-[calc(100vh-180px)], mobile h-[calc(100vh-160px)]). Sidebar hidden on mobile (hidden md:block).
routes.notes: Dual-layout pattern: mobile full-screen, desktop split-view (mirrors /inbox). Fetches thread + all threads (for sidebar). ThreadView component handles UI. notFound() if thread not found; no 404 page content shown. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Invite wizard. Multi-step form for users to invite new members to the platform, with vouch score calculation (vouch type × years known = score). Sends SMS/email invitations.

gate.description: Middleware enforces auth. Users must be signed in to invite.

persona_access.guest: Full access to invite others.
persona_access.inviter: Full access; this is the primary inviter UI.

exit_points: On success: show invite URL + 'Invite another person' button loops back to step 1
states: step 2 (vouch): select vouch type (Inner Circle vs. Standard)
step 4 (preview): review summary + reputation stake checkbox
step 5 (done): show invite URL + SMS/email confirmation text
routes.trust_direction_copy: Outgoing (inviter's vouch of invitee). Display shows vouch type (Inner Circle vs. Standard) + years known + calculated score (X pts). 'Reputation stake' message notes that invitee's guest rating affects voucher's power.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Excellent: max-w-[540px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-12, responsive text (md:text-3xl), step-indicator bars responsive. BIG_INPUT uses h-14 border-2, mt-1.5 spacing. Should scale well to 375px.
routes.notes: Multi-step state machine with step indicators (4 bars, all filled when done=step 5). Uses VOUCH_TYPES + YEARS_KNOWN_BUCKETS constants from lib/vouch-constants.ts. Computes score via computeVouchScore(vouchType, yearsKnown). Phone required (primary), email optional. Sends via POST /api/invites. Renders invite URL for manual sharing if SMS/email delivery isn't enough. Reputation stake acknowledgement checkbox enforces user understands invitee's ratings affect their vouch power.

routes.purpose: Listing detail page. Full listing view with photos, description, amenities, reviews, availability calendar, booking sidebar, trust tags, and house manual. Trust-gated: anonymous/low-trust viewers see preview or gated message.

gate.description: Anonymous viewers see only listings with see_preview='anyone'. Signed-in viewers evaluated via checkListingAccess: canSeePreview=true shows partial info; canSeeFull=true shows everything. Hosts see their own listings unrestricted. Direct URL access to hidden listings shows gated preview (hidden listings blocked in browse but accessible via direct link).

persona_access.guest: Sees preview info only (title, cover photo, house rules, area). 'Unlock to see full listing' overlay. Cannot see reviews, full description, or pricing if gated.
persona_access.host: Sees own listing fully. Edit button, pause/unpause toggle.
persona_access.inviter: Full access if access rules permit; trust degree (1°=direct vouch, 2°=connector, etc.) determines gate.

exit_points: Connection popover (shows trust path popover for trust details)
Wishlist save button (stays on page, adds to wishlist)
states: full-access (everything visible: photos, description, reviews, calendar, book button)
preview-only (gated overlay: 'This listing is private. __ degree connection required' or similar)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Host's trust of guest (incoming direction: how much the host trusts this viewer). Shown as 'X degree connection' badge or 'No mutual connections' message. Vouch path displayed in ConnectionPopover.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Should be responsive but needs full code review. Max width likely set on container. Sticky booking sidebar on desktop (sticky top-24). Anchor bar for jump links likely uses responsive widths. Image gallery likely responsive.
routes.notes: Complex trust evaluation: host sees own listing fully; non-host viewers evaluated via computeIncomingTrustPath (host→viewer). Direct link access bypasses hidden-listing browse-blocking (treats hidden as preview_gated for direct-link access only). StickyAnchorBar for jump links (Description, Reviews, Calendar, etc.). GatedListingView shown if access.can_see_preview=false and canSeePreview/canSeeFull checks fail. TrustTag badges show degree + mutual connections. PostStayVouchBanner likely appears below (for guests after checkout). Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Booking confirmation page (off-platform payment). Guest enters check-in, check-out, guest count, and optional intro message for host. Shows price breakdown (subtotal + cleaning + service fees). Note: Platform appears to use off-platform payment now (no payment processing in UI).

gate.description: Auth enforced by middleware. Route requires valid dates (?from=..&to=..&guests=..); invalid params redirect to listing detail.

persona_access.guest: Full access to submit booking request (if they can access the listing).
persona_access.host: Likely redirected or cannot access (not validated in code, but route is for guests).
persona_access.inviter: Full access if also a guest.

exit_points: ReserveForm submit → POST /api/bookings → redirect to /inbox (new thread created)
states: form (ReserveForm with trip summary + pricing + message input)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Host's trust of guest (for intro message context). Shows 'Strongest connector: __ vouched for you' if multi-hop path exists (trust score awareness).
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: order-1 md:order-2 for reordering on mobile (summary card moves below on mobile). grid gap-10 md:grid-cols-[1fr_400px] for layout. Sticky sidebar on desktop (sticky top-24).
routes.notes: Off-platform payment model: form collects intro message, computes fees client-side (8% cleaning, 12% service) for display only. ReserveForm handles POST to /api/bookings. Dates validated (required), redirect back if missing. Prices shown as summary (subtotal × nights + fees). House rules fetched from listing or shows defaults. Trust context passed (strongestConnector name for personalization). Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Public user profile. Shows user info (name, avatar, member since, bio, location, occupation, languages), vouch count, reviews, listings, and trust connection summary.

gate.description: Profiles are public. Anonymous viewers see name + avatar + member since + reviews (if any). Signed-in viewers also see trust path to this user (outgoing direction: 'You have X degree connection'). Vouch button available to signed-in users.

persona_access.guest: Can view profile. Cannot vouch (unauthenticated). Can see public reviews + listings.
persona_access.host: Full access including vouch button. Can see trust path (degree + connectors).

entry_points: Browse listing card → host name click
exit_points: VouchButton → opens vouch modal (stays on page)
states: public-profile (name, avatar, info chips, reviews, listings grid)
own-profile (user viewing their own profile: shows edit button)
trust-connection (shows degree badge + trust path if signed-in viewer)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Outgoing (viewer's trust of this user). Shows 'X degree connection' badge + 'Path: You → Connector → User' visualization. Vouch button labeled 'Add vouch' or 'Update vouch'.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: md:flex-row for header card (col on mobile). Avatar h-28 w-28 md:h-32 md:w-32 responsive sizing. Text responsive (md:text-3xl). Likely responsive throughout.
routes.notes: Public page, no auth gate. getProfileById(id) fetches user + listings + reviews. computeTrustPath(viewerId, profileId) returns degree + paths (only if viewerId !== profileId). isOwn check shows edit button + vouch context changes. ConnectionPopover on avatar for detailed trust breakdown. ProfileReviews component renders guest/host reviews. VouchButton opens VouchModal for creating/updating vouch. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Edit public profile info. Allows users to update name, bio, location, occupation, languages. Avatar and email managed through account settings (Clerk).

gate.description: Auth enforced. Users edit their own profile only.

persona_access.guest: Full access to edit their profile.

exit_points: ProfileEditForm submit → updates DB, stays on page or redirects
states: setup-pending (user webhook not yet synced: shows 'Give it a few seconds and reload')
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[680px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10, responsive text (md:text-3xl). Single-column layout, should scale well.
routes.notes: Fetches current profile from Supabase users table. Falls back gracefully if webhook hasn't synced yet (shows friendly message instead of 404). ProfileEditForm handles form submission logic. Clarifies that avatar/email are managed through 'account settings' (Clerk integration). Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Account settings hub. Shows links to: Personal info, Phone number, Notifications, Public profile. Also has Deactivate account section.

gate.description: Auth enforced.

persona_access.guest: Full access to their settings.

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[780px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10, rounded-2xl cards. Should scale well.
routes.notes: Hub page with SettingsLink components (Icon + title + description). Fetches user from Supabase for email display + phone masking. DeactivateButton wrapped in separate section. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Email notification preferences. Allows users to toggle which transactional emails they receive (booking requests, confirmations, messages, reminders, reviews).

gate.description: Auth enforced.

persona_access.guest: Full access to own preferences.

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[680px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10.
routes.notes: Fetches email_prefs JSON from users table; merges with DEFAULTS if missing fields. NotificationsForm handles submit. Transactional email types: booking_request, booking_confirmed, booking_declined, new_message, checkin_reminder, review_reminder. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Phone number management. Shows current phone (masked), allows changing to a new number via OTP verification.

gate.description: Auth enforced.

persona_access.guest: Full access to change their own phone.

exit_points: Form submission (stays on page after success)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[540px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10, responsive text (md:text-3xl). BIG_INPUT h-14 rounded-xl spacing. Should scale well.
routes.notes: Client-side state machine ("use client"). Fetches current phone via /api/users/me on mount. POST /api/users/phone/start to send OTP, POST /api/users/phone/verify to confirm. maskPhone utility hides all but last 4 digits. Phone required for account identity on Trustead (note in description). Edge-compatible (component, not route handler).

routes.purpose: Legacy redirect. Routes to /dashboard?tab=traveling for consolidated dashboard.

gate.description: Auth enforced by middleware.

persona_access.guest: Redirected to /dashboard?tab=traveling

routes.mobile_responsive_notes: N/A
routes.notes: Orphaned route. Candidate for removal.

routes.purpose: Trip detail page. Shows booking info (dates, guests, status), house manual, contact info, payment arrangement card. Prompts guest to vouch for host after checkout (PostStayVouchBanner).

gate.description: Auth enforced. Route validates that current user is a party to the booking (getTripDetail checks ownership).

persona_access.guest: Full access to view their own bookings.
persona_access.host: Likely cannot access (route is guest-facing; hosts see bookings on /dashboard hosting tab).
persona_access.inviter: Full access if also a guest with this booking.

exit_points: PostStayVouchBanner → /vouch or vouch modal (post-checkout guest vouches for host)
TripDetailActions buttons (likely message, cancel, review, etc.)
states: post-checkout (shows PostStayVouchBanner if today > check_out date)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Outgoing (guest vouching for host post-stay). PostStayVouchBanner prompts 'Vouch for [host name]' after checkout.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Not fully visible in excerpt, but uses max-w-[860px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-10. Should be responsive.
routes.notes: Shows booking summary (dates, guests, status badge). Renders house_manual.content if present (Object.entries filters null/undefined/empty). TripDetailActions delegates cancel/review/message logic. PostStayVouchBanner shown only after checkout (isPostCheckout = check_out < today). Payment arrangement card shown (PaymentArrangementCard component). Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Search-based vouch interface. Allows users to search for members by name/email/phone and vouch for them (or update existing vouch). Shows search results with avatar + contact info + 'Vouch' / 'Update vouch' buttons.

gate.description: Auth enforced.

persona_access.guest: Full access to vouch for others.
persona_access.inviter: Full access; this is secondary to /invite (which creates pre-vouch invites).

entry_points: Dashboard network tab → 'Vouch for someone' button
Link from /invite (if user not found, prompt to invite instead)
states: no-results (query entered, no matches found + invite prompt)
routes.trust_direction_copy: Outgoing (voucher's trust of vouchee). VouchModal shows vouch type + years known + calculated score.
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: max-w-[640px] container, px-4 md:px-6 md:py-12, responsive text (md:text-3xl). Search input (BIG_INPUT) responsive. User list div readable on narrow screens.
routes.notes: Client-side search component ("use client"). Debounced search with useEffect (300ms delay). Fetches /api/users/search?q=... (case-insensitive, matches name/email/phone). Results show already_vouched flag; button text 'Vouch' or 'Update vouch' changes accordingly. VouchModal handles form + submission. handleVouchSaved callback updates results list (sets already_vouched=true). No-results state links to /invite to encourage inviting non-members.

routes.purpose: Wishlists hub. Shows user's saved listing collections as grid of cards with cover photo mosaics. Each card links to /wishlists/[id].

gate.description: Auth enforced.

persona_access.guest: Can create + view their own wishlists.

entry_points: Heart icon in browse → wishlist selector → /wishlists
states: empty (no wishlists: empty state with 'Start exploring' button)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: px-4 md:px-10 lg:px-20 padding, grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 responsive grid. Should scale well.
routes.notes: Fetches lists via getUserWishlists(userId). WishlistCollectionCard renders cover_photos mosaic (see below). Defaults to empty state if no lists. Edge-compatible.

routes.purpose: Wishlist detail page. Shows list of saved listings as grid. Allows renaming and deleting the list (if not default). Shows empty state if list is empty.

gate.description: Auth enforced. Route validates ownership (getWishlistWithItems checks user_id).

persona_access.guest: Full access to their own wishlists.
persona_access.host: Full access to their own wishlists.
persona_access.inviter: Full access to their own wishlists.

entry_points: Direct /wishlists/[id] URL (if owned by current user)
states: empty (zero items: empty state with 'Browse stays' button)
routes.trust_direction_copy: N/A (display of saved listings; no trust context)
routes.mobile_responsive_notes: Good: px-4 md:px-10 lg:px-20 padding, likely uses responsive grid from live listing cards.
routes.notes: Fetches wishlist + items via getWishlistWithItems(userId, listId). WishlistActions component handles rename + delete; delete disabled if is_default=true. LiveListingCard component renders each item (trust context passed separately if needed). notFound() if list doesn't exist or user doesn't own it. Edge-compatible.

api_routes.purpose: Create pending contact_request (booking) from guest to host. Opens/reuses message thread, sends notification emails.
Return aggregate listing count (for browse page stats, pagination hints, etc.)
GET: list contact requests for current user (role={host|guest}, status filter). POST: likely redundant with /api/bookings.
Update contact request status (accept, decline, cancel).
Cancel a contact request (guest cancels their booking request).
Cron job: checks for upcoming check-ins, sends reminder emails.
known_callers: External cron scheduler (e.g., EasyCron, Vercel cron)

api_routes.purpose: Geocode address → lat/lng (reverse or forward geocoding).
Report an incident/safety issue. Creates incident record.
known_callers: Help form or profile action menu

api_routes.purpose: GET: list current user's sent invites (with status/claimed-by info). POST: create new invite + send SMS/email.
GET: likely unused (browse uses getBrowseListings from lib). POST: create new listing (with photos, amenities, pricing, gating rules).
GET: fetch single listing. PATCH: update listing (host only). DELETE: delete listing (host only).
Manage availability calendar: query blocked ranges, set/update blocking, delete blockings.
